listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: A visita ao campo de concentração foi muito intensa e profunda, com uma experiência bem guiada e estruturada. É realmente emocionante e quem é mais sensível pode ficar extremamente emocionado. O lugar apresenta as informações de forma clara e impactante, permitindo compreender melhor o contexto histórico. Sem sombra de dúvidas é um ambiente sensível e doloroso, marcado por uma história extremamente triste. A exposição transmite o peso dos acontecimentos e reforça a importância de preservar essa memória. Uma visita forte e necessária pra qualquer um que queira conhecer essa parte do passado. Recomendo.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text:
A Chilling Reminder of What Humanity Must Never Become…

Visiting this concentration camp had been on my bucket list for a long time — and standing there in person was far more powerful and unsettling than anything I’d ever read or watched.

This place is a masterclass in deception, cruelty, and the darkest consequences of war. It’s not just a historical site; it’s a confrontation with what humans are capable of when morality collapses.

The camp is about an hour outside Berlin (I went with a guided bus tour), and I highly recommend going with a guide. The layers of planning, manipulation, and brutality are far more understandable when someone explains the psychological and architectural details behind them.

Plan to spend at least two hours. Some of the most haunting aspects include:
•	Original prison blocks still intact — cramped, harsh, and deeply disturbing to walk through.
•	The way prisoners were systematically brainwashed, kept unaware of the true horrors happening around them.
•	How executions were carried out in complete secrecy — quiet enough that neither the prisoners inside nor the world outside had any clue.
.      How the jailers used to inspect/ mutate bodies of deceased to find any valuables, there is a statue built for this.
•	The camp’s semi-arc design, built so guards could observe almost every movement from a single vantage point — an engineering of control and fear.
•	Exhibits on medical experiments, where human lives were treated with the coldness of laboratory specimens.

This visit is not easy. It shouldn’t be.
But it is a must-visit — not as a tourist attraction, but as a reminder, as a warning, and as a duty to history. Places like these force us to remember what must never be repeated.

Thank you!

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: We have all heard about the atrocities during WW11 ,but this place is a real awakening to just how cruel humans can be to other humans.   To see the actual showers where people were gassed and the ovens used to incinerate was shocking.   To read the stories of both the interred and 'staff' again took my breath away,  to think that people willingly experimented and exterminated others.  Not ashamed to say I cried

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Miguel is a fantastic guide with a real passion for 20th-century history, especially the events leading up to WWII. What I really liked was how he connected so many different parts of the story, giving us a broader understanding of how the world ended up on the path that led to the war and the atrocities imposed on millions of innocent human beings. He also shared a great list of books and movies I can’t wait to dive into. Even with the rain, he was super thoughtful and made sure we were comfortable the whole time. A truly memorable experience—highly recommended.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text:
Book this tour. You don’t want to miss out on this opportunity. We learned so much about Sachsenhauser concentration camp and the historical context of how it and the concentration camp system during the  Second World War came about and  why. Georgia , our guide, was great. She was so knowledgeable explaining all that we saw. She set a comfortable, calm tone and pace for the day taking us through the train system and all through the camp. She presented facts, not a bias, which we appreciated. She spoke clearly and didn’t over talk. She continued to help us on our return to Berlin navigating the train system and she offered helpful suggestions and answered all of our questions.
This tour has a lot of walking and is outside most of the time.  I suggest dress in layers , bring a hat and sunscreen and check the weather report. Wear comfortable shoes. Pack water and snacks/ food that is easy to eat as there no official lunch stop. I highly recommend this tour. Ask for Georgia to guide you. It will be an amazing experience.

Our guide Luka was simply amazing.

His knowledge of German history in general and of this concentration camp in particular was extremely impressive and he was able to explain both in a succinct and clear way.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour

text: Was a good laugh and made the 6 hour tour entertaining

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Our tour guide, Richard, was really phenomenal. Extremely informational and we got a very good overview of the camp as well as a lot of stories as to the tragedies that occurred there. It was hard to visit but absolutely important to see and experience. Thank you Richard for all of the information!

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Wonderful experience and the guide Roshana was very kind and experienced. Really enjoyded it

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Fantastic tour guide Sebastián from Original Berlín Tours. The memorial is a chilling reminder that the ideas of fascism have not disappeared today. Recommended visit. Not a day for fun but for reflection.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Georgia was the best tour guide ever.. the care and empathy provided, during this very informative tour experience was amazing. So informative, and explained well to everyone. A great experience in the most sensitive circumstances. Thankyou

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Our tour guide, Roshana, was very patient and eager to answer all of our questions. She was very knowledgeable about all of the memorials. I would definitely ask for her on another tour.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: A very educational experience. Would definitely recommend going. It's important to keep in mind that it could take over 4 hours to see it all though.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Estando en Berlín, no podía faltar apuntarse a una excursión o tour para visitar este lugar. Ha valido la pena ir con el guía turístico y que además estaba bien informado y documentado de lo que vamos a visitar. Recorrimos el recinto accediendo a los diferentes sitios que se pueden visitar. Tuvimos tiempo para recorrer una parte del mismo por nuestra cuenta. Toda una experiencia que junto a las fotos hechas, te queda un gran recuerdo.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: The tour is very interesting. Lots of information and gives a complete image of all the (horrific) things that took place here. Would highly recommend this to anyone!

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: The Sachsenhausen Concentration Camp Memorial Tour was a deeply moving and insightful experience, made even more so by our very informative and knowledgeable tour guide, Tom, who helped bring the history of the site to life.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: What a place!! And I don't mean it in a good way!! Well worth a visit for the experience of a concentration camp! You'll be surprised at the history.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: A very moving experience and so much history.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Anbefaler alle å dra en tur på en konsentrasjon leir iløpet av livet sitt. Man får ett godt innblikk i hvordan det var å være jøde i tyskland her, hvordan de ble behandlet og hva de måtte gå gjennom. Veldig sterkt å lese på de ulike plansjene som henger på veggene, der de står om alt de måtte gjennomgå her. Det var også veldig trist å se hvor trange rom de hadde å forholde seg til der de måtte stå så mange så tett sammen i rommene.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text:
Paul was great with providing a deep history of Sachsenhausen whilst remaining friendly throughout that many of us felt comfortable asking questions

BTW thanks for the food reccomendations!

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: This tour was an incredible  experience. We received well-chosen and interesting information from our guide. There was also free time to read and visit the installations. Lots of surprising information about the Soviet Union and the GDR. Thank you it was very well done!

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Took a tour with Sebastian, he was great! Very knowledgeable and took a more pensive, moral take on it, rather than objectively guiding you on what you're seeing.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: This was one of the best tours I have ever experienced! Our guide, Sebastian, was exceptional. Sharing not only the facts but also asking us to think more deeply about what we were seeing.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Thanks to Sebastian for a great tour. Clearly passionate about his history and full of knowledge. Extremely helpful and witty. 🇮🇪🇨🇱

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text:
La verdad es que la visita es innegociable, imprescindible conocer las atrocidades que puede llegar a cometer el ser humano.
Audio guía por tres euros que te explica cada detalle a lo largo del recorrido.
Te enseñan restos de cada una de las instalaciones que fueron usadas durante el nazismo (barracones, cárcel, hornos, cámaras, cocinas…).
Por poner un pero es una visita que ko se hace en un rato, al menos 5 horas y si es en detalle 7 u 8 por lo que sería bueno tener un sitio donde reponer fuerzas, aseo…

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Un lugar donde las emociones están  a flor de piel. Queda poco conservado  pero con la ayuda de audioguia, te haces una idea muy clara de lo que fue: una masacre inhumana

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Today we were fortunate enough to do the sachsenhausen tour with guide Paul. Paul was very knowledgeable and managed our large group very well. Whilst being very knowledgeable, Paul made the tour very accessible and easy to follow despite the often complicated subject matter. Would definitely recommend and felt it was amazing value for money!

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Powerful experience with good preservation and restoration. Worth the visit with a knowledgeable tour guide. Our guide Miguel was fabulous and added so much to help us process this terrible place in history and human suffering.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: A very informative trip. The guide was really passionate about his work and provided extra materials for us in case we were interested later, and he explained things very well. Unfortunately everything was a bit rushed as we had to take the slow train, so we didn't have much time to look around inside the buildings.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Miguel was an excellent tour guide. He was incredibly knowledgeable and kept the tour very interesting. He was very helpful to anyone who wanted more information on any aspect of the tour. Highly recommended this tour

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour

text: The guide Greg was really amazing and friendly. Was an remarkable experience.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: The guide was really good one. He was interested we would take more and more information. And he did all walk with a passion that is very important.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: I have never been more impressed with the commitment and passion to educate of a tour guide! Thank you Miguel for a learning experience, including the history of war in Germany, oppression and eugenics outside Germany, and the Holocaust, that I will never forget!

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Excellent tour - would totally recommend. Miguel was very passionate and insightful about the history at Sachsenhausen

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Excellent tour. Very informative and a lot of value for the price. Our tour guide Miguel was excellent, not only describing what we were seeing but also describing sociopolitical issues going on at the time that gave the whole experience a deeper perspective.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: The guide was superb.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Tour guide was great! Learned alot. Definitely recommend

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Campbell and Martin were our tour guides. They were incredibly knowledgeable and fun. We had a great time and learned a great deal. This is history that should be shared and experienced so that we do not forget what happened.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: It was really a Marvelous experience of visiting the historical place like this..... If you are Planning to come to Germany must visit this place.... Inside you can feel the World war 2 feeling how it was before....

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: My wife and I took the tour.  Maria was our tour guide.  SHE WAS EXCELLENT!!  Incredible command of the facts and stories.  She was simply amazing.  I could have listened to her talk all day.  She didn't just recite facts, but gave context to the events happening both in and out of the Camp.  I highly recommend the tour, and if at all possible, get Maria as the guide.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: I can’t recommend the tour to Sachsenhausen enough. Miguel was absolutely amazing. So charismatic and his knowledge of dates and names was just outstanding. My favourite part of our trip to Berlin.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Thoroughly enjoyed the tour. The guide, Richard (I think), was super knowledgeable and personable so the information he shared was always gripping and thought-provoking. There's a good balance between guided moments and "explore on your own" time. The amount of walking was unholy, tho. I'd gladly pay a bit more to have a shuttle drop-off directly in the parking lot of the visitor center.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Amazing experience with Sebastián which is a great guide!

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: A must see to fully understand the atrocities that happened here. Harrowing but worth the visit

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: It was an important experience.  Not beautiful but necessary.  The tour was made especially worthwhile thanks the our guide, Richard.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Miguel was great.  One of the few ones I've ever seen. Highly recommended

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Tour très intéressant, sujet difficile mais passionnant. Amélia notre guide a vraiment été super, merci encore !

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Et rigtig fedt sted med meget historie og "grimme" oplevelser giver et rigtig godt indblik i hvordan jøderne havde det dengang.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: You meet in the Friedrichstrasse train station.   Well organized and ready to go.   The guide was Waldi who was full of knowledge and funny.   Very hot day.  Time very well spent.   Alot of Walking so make sure your prepared.   You eat while the touring is going.  Which allows you to see more.   Excellent guide A+

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Very harrowing experience, extremely dark horrid place but a must see,we can never forget

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Somehow I ended up on this tour today. Completely by accident. Thought I was going on a walking tour of Berlin. I thought it was strange when we got on a train but nobody mentioned anything about a concentration camp until we got to the station. That should have been a clue I was at the wrong place. What a trip. Sebastian was great and I enjoyed hearing his knowledge and perspective of past events and tying it into the present moment.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: This was such a memorable experience thanks to our tour guide, Sebastian. He is truly passionate about history. He offered new perspectives and many insights, tying many events in history together. I really like the way he conducted the tour. Highly recommend!

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Depressing and long walking tour with an interesting and informative tour guide. Highly recommended.

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: This tour is definitely worth doing if you are in Berlin! We loved our tour guide Paul as he was very knowledgable, but also easy to have a conversation with. He is able to give good descriptions and stories about each major spot in the camp. He helps you buy your train ticket as well. I would have never gone here with out a tour guide or else I would have been lost and not received the same information!

listing_name: Sachsenhausen Tour Berlin Concentration Camp Memorial Tour
text: Lugar impresionante, merece la pena documentarte un poco y hacerlo por tu cuenta para no depender del avance del grupo. De hecho, en los barracones no dejan entrar a los grupos.
